headline: Trimble (TRMB): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Trimble’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 26.3% of its value and falling to $55.66 per share. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
